allow: Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); const k = process.env.ENCRYPTION_KEY; console.log\(''Key exists:'', !!k\); console.log\(''Key length:'', k ? k.length : 0\);")
Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); const k = process.env.ENCRYPTION_KEY; console.log\(''Key exists:'', Boolean\(k\)\); console.log\(''Key length:'', k ? k.length : 0\);")

Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); console.log\(''SUPABASE_URL set:'', Boolean\(process.env.SUPABASE_URL\)\); console.log\(''ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set:'', Boolean\(process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\)\);")
